title: Notification regarding exemption of persons repatriated from Iraq and Kuwait

(D.N.) 127 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 111] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, MARCH 22.1991/CHAITRA 1,1913 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be Bled as a separate compilation (1) 805 GI/91 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZ,ETTP OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART il—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th March, 1991 GSR. 172 (]£),—In the exercise oL the powers conferred bv Section 22 of the Passports, Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), (hereinafter referred to as the said Act) and in supersession of the i-ctllication of the Government of India in the Ministry of External Affairs No. G.S.R. £0(E), dated 19th February, 1991, except as respect things done or, omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government being uf the opinion thut it is uefcssnry and expedient in public interest so to do, hereby exempts the persons repatriated from Iraq or Kuwait to India, during the period commencing on 2nd August, 1990 and ending with 14th March, 1991, from the operation o\ the provisions of clause (h) of Sub-Section(2) of Section 6 of tho said Act.
